title: First Solar Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Reaffirms Guidance
text: First Solar Inc. announced first quarter 2026 financial results, reaffirming full-year 2026 guidance. The company reported record revenue of $1.04 billion and record net income of $347 million, representing 24% and 65% year-over-year growth respectively. Diluted earnings per share reached $3.22 compared to $1.95 in the prior year quarter. Adjusted EBITDA totaled $520 million, representing a 50% margin. The gross margin expanded to 47% from 41% in the prior year, driven by higher Section 45X tax credit volumes, lower freight costs, and improved manufacturing efficiency. Module sales volumes totaled 4.3 GW, with 3.0 GW from U.S. facilities and 1.0 GW from India. U.S. average selling price reached $0.34/watt, while India averaged $0.20/watt. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance including net sales of $4.9-$5.2 billion, adjusted EBITDA of $2.6-$2.8 billion, and Section 45X tax credits of $2.1-$2.2 billion. The 2026 guidance assumes continued meaningful Section 45X tax credit monetization at prices generally consistent with current market levels. The contracted backlog stands at 47.9 GW valued at $14.4 billion, with shipments scheduled through 2030, providing substantial multi-year visibility.
